---
title: "Create simulated data"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
input_df <- read_excel("data/local minimal template.xlsx")

input_df[1:1000,] <- NA
```

```{r}
df <- input_df |>
  mutate(site = "My site",
         alai_up_uid = row_number(),
         age = 18+rnorm(1000, mean = 22, sd = 8)) 
```
